name: Audio to MP3 Converter
description: Batch convert audio files to MP3 using FFmpeg with configurable bitrate, mode and encoding settings.
requirements: Node v18+, ffmpeg and ffprobe installed (brew install ffmpeg)
author: superpowers

input_schema.name: input-folder
input_schema.label: Input Folder
input_schema.description: Folder containing audio files to convert

input_schema.name: output-folder
input_schema.label: Output Folder
input_schema.description: Where to save the converted MP3 files (leave empty to save alongside originals)

input_schema.name: encoding-mode
input_schema.label: Encoding Mode
input_schema.description: CBR produces a fixed bitrate for predictable file sizes. VBR adjusts bitrate per-frame for better quality-to-size efficiency.

input_schema.name: bitrate
input_schema.label: Bitrate (CBR mode)
input_schema.description: Target bitrate used in CBR mode. Ignored when VBR is selected.

input_schema.name: vbr-quality
input_schema.label: VBR Quality
input_schema.description: Quality level used in VBR mode (0 = highest quality / largest files, 9 = smallest files / lowest quality). V4 is a good general-purpose default. Ignored when CBR is selected.

input_schema.name: sample-rate
input_schema.label: Sample Rate
input_schema.description: Output audio sample rate. "original" keeps the source rate unchanged.

input_schema.name: channels
input_schema.label: Channels
input_schema.description: Output channel layout. "original" preserves the source channel count.
